name: ListPermissionSetsProvisionedToAccountRequest
description: ListPermissionSetsProvisionedToAccountRequest schema from AWS IAM Identity Center

allOf.description: The ARN of the IAM Identity Center instance under which the operation will be executed. For more information about ARNs, see Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) and AWS Service Namespaces in the AWS General Reference.
The identifier of the AWS account from which to list the assignments.
The status object for the permission set provisioning operation.
The maximum number of results to display for the assignment.
The pagination token for the list API. Initially the value is null. Use the output of previous API calls to make subsequent calls.
